nasb.text: The priest shall look at the raw flesh, and he shall pronounce him unclean; the raw flesh is unclean, it is leprosy.

esv.text: And the priest shall examine the raw flesh and pronounce him unclean. Raw flesh is unclean, for it is a leprous disease.

cnv.text: 祭司發現那紅腫的肉，就要宣布他為不潔淨；紅腫的肉原來是不潔淨的，是痲風病。

ccb.text: 祭司看到他身上的溃烂之处，就要宣布他是不洁净的，因为那溃烂之处表明他患了麻风病。
